html:
The Compass is an item found in the Survival crafting tab, and requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 1 Gold Nugget and 1 Papyrus to craft.

Its function is to tell the orientation of the player when the player is not using minimap. When examined, the player will state what direction they're facing (the camera is rotated with the E and Q buttons). The player will start out oriented Northeast.

This item is useless to Wes and Wilbur, since they cannot talk and thus cannot interact with the item.

Trivia

  • The Compass was introduced in the It's not a rock! update.
  • The Golden Compass may be a reference to the American edition of the first book of the famous His Dark Materials trilogy, by Philip Pullman, later made into a movie.
  • Despite Winona's quote (and the fact that she is not playable in the original Don't Starve), she is the only one who names the cardinal directions incorrectly in DS game files.

Gallery

  • Wilson in starting position, showing screen orientation as northeast.
  • Compass as seen in the poster for the East or West, Base is Best update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Tab

Miscellaneous
"compass"
“Which way am I facing?”
–Wilson
“Can't get a reading.”
–Willow
“Is all directions, but no directions.”
–Wolfgang
“I am directionless.”
–Wendy
“UNABLE TO OBTAIN BEARINGS”
–WX-78
“The coordinates remain unknown.”
–Wickerbottom
“Points to True North.”
–Woodie
“I've lost my way.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, it is attracted to the magnetic poles of this world.”
–Wagstaff
“A reading cannöt be gleaned.”
–Wigfrid
“No reading.”
–Webber
“How do I use this thing again?”
–Walani
“Hmm, no reading.”
–Warly
“'Tis a compass.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA KNOW'ST NAUGHT”
–Wilba
“Which way?”
–Wormwood
“Mine's better.”
–Wheeler
“I'm pretty good with directions.”
–Winona
“For when up is down and down is out.”
–Wortox
“There spinny needle inside!”
–Wurt
“The Pinetree Pioneer handbook says to always bring a compass!”
–Walter
“If only it could tell me which way is past and which way is future.”
–Wanda
The Compass is an item found in the Survival crafting tab, and requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 1 Gold Nugget and 1 Papyrus to craft.
Its function is to tell the orientation of the player when the player is not using minimap. When examined, the player will state what direction they're facing (the camera is rotated with the E and Q buttons). The player will start out oriented Northeast.
This item is useless to Wes and Wilbur, since they cannot talk and thus cannot interact with the item.
Usage[edit | edit source]
×2
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Compass was introduced in the It's not a rock! update.
The Golden Compass may be a reference to the American edition of the first book of the famous His Dark Materials trilogy, by Philip Pullman, later made into a movie.
Despite Winona's quote (and the fact that she is not playable in the original Don't Starve), she is the only one who names the cardinal directions incorrectly in DS game files.

Wilson in starting position, showing screen orientation as northeast.
Compass as seen in the poster for the East or West, Base is Best update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

La bàn là một vật phẩm được tìm thấy trong tab chế tạo Sinh tồn và yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu cũng như 1 Thỏi Vàng và 1 Giấy cói để chế tạo.

Shows the location of other players carrying a compass. |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "compass" |ingredient1 = Gold Nugget |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Papyrus |multiplier2 = 1 |tab = survival |tier = {{pic24|Science Machine}} |droppedBy ={{Pic24|Shipwrecked icon}}: {{Pic32|X Marks The Spot}} [[Ocean]] ({{pic24|Trawl Net}}) |description = Points the way north.}} {{Quotes | wilson = Which way am I facing? | willow = Can't get a reading. | wolfgang = Is all directions, but no directions. | wendy = I am directionless. | wx78 = UNABLE TO OBTAIN BEARINGS | wickerbottom = The coordinates remain unknown. | woodie = Points to True North. | maxwell = I've lost my way. | wagstaff = Theoretically, it is attracted to the magnetic poles of this world. | wigfrid = A reading cannöt be gleaned. | webber = No reading. | walani = How do I use this thing again? | warly = Hmm, no reading. | woodlegs = 'Tis a compass. | wilba = WILBA KNOW'ST NAUGHT | wormwood = Which way? | wheeler = Mine's better. | winona = I'm pretty good with directions. | wortox = For when up is down and down is out. | wurt = There spinny needle inside! | walter = The Pinetree Pioneer handbook says to always bring a compass! | wanda = If only it could tell me which way is past and which way is future. | choose = wolfgang}} The '''Compass''' is an [[item]] found in the [[Survival]] [[Crafting|crafting tab]], and requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and 1 [[Gold Nugget]] and 1 [[Papyrus]] to craft. Its function is to tell the orientation of the player when the player is not using minimap. When examined, the player will state what direction they're facing (the camera is rotated with the E and Q buttons). The player will start out oriented Northeast. This item is useless to [[Wes]] and [[Wilbur]], since they cannot talk and thus cannot interact with the item. =={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage== {{Recipe |item1 = Compass |count1 = 1 |item2 = Pig Skin |count2 = 2 |item3 = Batilisk Wing |count3 = 1 |result = Cowl |Science 2 = yes |dlc = Hamlet}} =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * The Compass was introduced in the ''[[Version History#It's not a rock!|It's not a rock!]]'' update. * The Golden Compass may be a reference to the American edition of the first book of the famous ''[[Wikipedia:His Dark Materials|His Dark Materials]]'' trilogy, by Philip Pullman, later made into a movie. * Despite [[Winona|Winona's]] quote (and the fact that she is not playable in the original Don't Starve), she is the only one who names the cardinal directions incorrectly in DS game files. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Starting_orientation.png|Wilson in starting position, showing screen orientation as northeast.
